### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Messages](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Messages')

## MessageType Class

Strongly\-typed value object representing a message type in the format \{domain\}\-\{name\}\-v\{ver\}\.
Immutable, equatable, and serialized as a plain JSON string via [MessageTypeJsonConverter](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageTypeJsonConverter.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Messages\.MessageTypeJsonConverter')\.

```csharp
public sealed record MessageType : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageType>
```

## MessageType\.MaxLength Field

Maximum total length of the canonical MessageType string\.
Domain max 64 \+ name max 120 \+ "\-v" \+ version digits ≈ 192\.

```csharp
public const int MaxLength = 192;
```

## MessageType\.Assemble\(string, Type, int\) Method

Assembles a [MessageType](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageType.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Messages\.MessageType') from a domain name, \.NET message type, and version\.
The type name is converted from PascalCase to kebab\-case \(no suffix stripping\)\.

```csharp
public static Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageType Assemble(string domain, System.Type messageType, int version);
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageType.Assemble(string,System.Type,int).domain'></a>

`domain` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The domain name \(lowercase, no hyphens\)\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageType.Assemble(string,System.Type,int).messageType'></a>

`messageType` [System\.Type](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.type 'System\.Type')

The \.NET type whose name will be converted to kebab\-case\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageType.Assemble(string,System.Type,int).version'></a>

`version` [System\.Int32](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.int32 'System\.Int32')

The message version \(must be \>= 1\)\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageType.DomainRegex()'></a>

## MessageType\.DomainRegex\(\) Method

```csharp
private static System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex DomainRegex();
```

#### Returns
[System\.Text\.RegularExpressions\.Regex](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.text.regularexpressions.regex 'System\.Text\.RegularExpressions\.Regex')

### Remarks
Pattern:<br/>

```csharp
^[a-z0-9]+$
```<br/>
Explanation:<br/>

```csharp
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.<br/>
○ Match a character in the set [0-9a-z] atomically at least once.<br/>
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.<br/>
```

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.MessageType.NameRegex()'></a>

## MessageType\.NameRegex\(\) Method

```csharp
private static System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex NameRegex();
```

#### Returns
[System\.Text\.RegularExpressions\.Regex](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.text.regularexpressions.regex 'System\.Text\.RegularExpressions\.Regex')

### Remarks
Pattern:<br/>

```csharp
^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$
```<br/>
Explanation:<br/>

```csharp
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.<br/>
○ Match a character in the set [0-9a-z].<br/>
○ Optional (greedy).<br/>
    ○ 1st capture group.<br/>
        ○ Match a character in the set [\-0-9a-z] greedily any number of times.<br/>
        ○ Match a character in the set [0-9a-z].<br/>
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.<br/>
```

## MessageType\.VersionSuffixRegex\(\) Method

```csharp
private static System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex VersionSuffixRegex();
```

#### Returns
[System\.Text\.RegularExpressions\.Regex](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.text.regularexpressions.regex 'System\.Text\.RegularExpressions\.Regex')

### Remarks
Pattern:<br/>

```csharp
-v(\\d+)$
```<br/>
Explanation:<br/>

```csharp
○ Match the string "-v".<br/>
○ 1st capture group.<br/>
    ○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.<br/>
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.<br/>
```
